name: Stealthy Scheduled Task Creation via VBA Macro Detected
description: Detects the creation of scheduled tasks by Microsoft Office applications (`winword.exe`, `excel.exe`, etc.) via `taskschd.dll`. This is a strong indicator of a malicious VBA macro attempting to establish persistence, which is a common persistence and execution technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: an Office application, **{source_image}**, is attempting to create a scheduled task by loading `taskschd.dll`. This is a strong indicator of a **VBA macro attempting to establish Persistence** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1053.005**). This technique is often used to execute malicious code at a later time or during system startup. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious macro. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: source_image
parameters.description: The Office application that is attempting to create the scheduled task.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
